entities.name: Registry (JSONL)
entities.context: Data storage mechanism in JSONL format for pipeline tracking

entities.name: Pipeline DB
entities.context: Database component that syncs with the registry

entities.name: Filesystem
entities.context: File storage layer that syncs with registry

entities.name: Orchestrator
entities.context: Coordination system that receives phase reports and grants approvals

entities.name: PRD
entities.context: Product Requirements Document generated during discovery phases

entities.name: Rubric
entities.context: 6-dimension evaluation framework with scoring threshold of 8.0

entities.name: On-conflict resolution rules
entities.context: Rules for handling sync conflicts between registry, DB, and filesystem

entities.name: Discovery phase
entities.context: Early phases (0-3) focused on problem statement and findings

entities.name: Approval workflow
entities.context: Phase 5 checkpoint requiring orchestrator sign-off before cleanup

entities.name: HARD STOPS
entities.context: Mandatory checkpoints that halt work if scope expands or rubric score stays below 8.0 after 2 iterations

relationships.context: One-way sync from registry to filesystem
Rules govern how registry handles sync conflicts
PRD is evaluated against rubric's 6 dimensions
Discovery phases produce the PRD document
Orchestrator grants approval at phase 5 checkpoint
Rubric score below 8.0 after iterations triggers hard stop
